name: love
description: The root LOVE namespace. All modules, functions, and callbacks live under love.

name: graphics
description: The graphics module draws shapes, images, and text to the screen.

name: draw
signature: love.graphics.draw(drawable, x, y, r, sx, sy)

params.name: x
params.description: The x position to draw at.

params.name: y
params.description: The y position to draw at.

params.name: sx
params.description: Scale factor on the x axis.

params.name: sy
params.description: Scale factor on the y axis.

description: Draws a Drawable object on the screen with optional transform.

params.name: mode
params.description: How to draw the rectangle: 'fill' or 'line'.

params.name: x
params.description: The x position of the top-left corner.

params.name: y
params.description: The y position of the top-left corner.

name: audio
description: The audio module plays and manages sound sources.

name: load

params.name: arg
params.description: Command line arguments given to the game.

description: Called exactly once at the beginning of the game.

name: update

params.name: dt
params.description: Time since the last update in seconds.

description: Called every frame to update game state.

name: draw
description: Called every frame to render the game.

name: DrawMode
description: How a shape is drawn: 'fill' fills the interior, 'line' draws only the outline.
